title: Day 15 Reflection
description: Solidify Context API patterns and global state thinking before Redux Toolkit tomorrow.

prompts.question: When would you pass theme via props instead of Context? When is Context the right choice?
prompts.guidance: Think about prop drilling depth and update frequency.

prompts.question: Did you encounter unnecessary re-renders from your ThemeProvider? How did you diagnose and fix them?
prompts.guidance: Mention React DevTools highlight updates or useMemo.

prompts.question: Explain call, apply, and bind in your own words with one example each.
prompts.guidance: Connect to interview questions about this keyword.

prompts.question: How does your system theme mode detect and respond to OS preference changes?
What state belongs in Context vs what should stay local or move to Redux tomorrow?
prompts.guidance: Preview Day 16 without implementing Redux today.
